use_cases: Displaying multiple cards in a horizontally scrollable carousel with animated slide transitions
Showing product or feature cards with configurable cards-per-view for responsive layouts
Browsing image galleries or testimonials with prev/next navigation controls
Presenting grouped content sections that need to cycle through multiple items
Creating interactive card collections with smooth animation effects on navigation
ai_summary: A React carousel card component that displays multiple cards in a sliding container with configurable cards-per-view and smooth animated transitions. Features automatic index management, single-card detection, and responsive layout support. Supports navigation through data arrays with visual slide animations using CSS transforms and transitions.
